headline: Did Ecolab’s (ECL) US$5 Billion Bond Issuance Just Reframe Its Funding-Led Efficiency Story?
summary: Earlier in May, Ecolab Inc. completed several fixed-rate senior unsecured note offerings totaling about US$5.00 billion, with maturities from 2029 to 2036 and coupons ranging from 4.600% to 5.350%, alongside a large underwriting syndicate including J.P. Morgan, BofA Securities, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs, Barclays, Wells Fargo, U.S. Bancorp, and SMBC Nikko. These sizeable bond issues, coming alongside in-line Q1 2026 results and higher full-year sales guidance, highlight how Ecolab is coupling...
